Site.title: Site
Site.description: Represents a physical location or area that requires cleaning services within the CleanOps Hub application.

name.description: The common name or identifier for the cleaning site, e.g., 'Anne Mclaren' or 'MRC Epidemiology Level 3'.

siteCode.description: The unique code for the site, e.g., 'UOC1'.

status.description: The current operational status of the site, indicating client satisfaction or required actions. Possible values include: 'N/A', 'Client happy', 'Operations request', 'Client concerns', 'Under control', 'Site under action plan', 'Site requires action plan'.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the site.

additionalCleaners.description: A list of cleaners who have been trained at or previously cleaned the site.

role.description: The cleaner's association with the site.

Cleaner.title: Cleaner
Cleaner.description: Represents an individual cleaner managed within the CleanOps Hub application, including their profile, performance rating, and leave tracking.

name.description: The full name of the cleaner, e.g., 'Alasdair Strachan'.

rating.description: The current performance rating of the cleaner, based on feedback or operational assessment. Possible values include: 'N/A', 'Excellent feedback', 'Site satisfied', 'Slight improvement needed', 'Needs retraining', 'Under action plan', 'Operational concerns'.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the cleaner.

holidayAllowance.description: The total number of holiday days the cleaner is entitled to per year.

holidayTaken.description: The number of holiday days the cleaner has taken so far.

sickDaysTaken.description: The total number of sick days taken by the cleaner.

availabilityStatus.description: The cleaner's availability for extra hours.

availableLots.description: Which lots the cleaner is available to work in for extra hours.

Leave.title: Leave
Leave.description: Represents a single day of absence (holiday or sickness) for a cleaner.

cleanerId.description: The ID of the cleaner taking leave.

cleanerName.description: The name of the cleaner taking leave.

coverAssignments.description: A list of cover assignments for the leave day.

CoverAssignment.title: CoverAssignment
CoverAssignment.description: Represents the assignment of a cover cleaner to a specific shift.

site.description: The site of the shift being covered.

coverCleanerName.description: The name of the cleaner providing cover.

ActionPlanTask.title: ActionPlanTask
ActionPlanTask.description: A single task within an action plan.

beforeImageUrl.description: URL of the 'before' image for the task.

afterImageUrl.description: URL of the 'after' image for the task.

ActionPlan.title: ActionPlan
ActionPlan.description: An action plan for a site or a cleaner.

ScheduleEntry.title: ScheduleEntry
ScheduleEntry.description: Represents a single entry in the cleaning schedule.

site.description: The name of the site being cleaned.

cleaner.description: The name of the cleaner assigned.

start.description: The start time of the shift.

finish.description: The finish time of the shift.

Consumable.title: Consumable
Consumable.description: A consumable supply item for a site, including its name and ordering code.

name.description: The name of the supply item.

orderingCode.description: The ordering code for the item.

MonthlySupplyOrder.title: MonthlySupplyOrder
MonthlySupplyOrder.description: Represents the quantity of a consumable ordered for a specific site in a given month.

quantity.description: The quantity ordered for the month.

MonthlyAudit.title: Monthly Audit
MonthlyAudit.description: Represents a site audit for a specific month.

status.description: The current status of the audit for the site.

bookedDate.description: The date the audit is booked for or was completed on.

bookedTime.description: The time the audit is booked for.

auditor.description: The person assigned to conduct the audit.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: A general appointment or event in the diary.

assignee.description: The person this appointment is assigned to.

site.description: The site associated with the appointment.

startTime.description: The start time of the appointment.

endTime.description: The end time of the appointment.

recurrence.description: The recurrence frequency of the appointment.

recurrenceEndDate.description: The end date for the recurring appointment (YYYY-MM-DD).

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A single to-do item or task.

dueDate.description: The due date of the task (YYYY-MM-DD).

completed.description: Whether the task is completed or not.

assignee.description: The person this task is assigned to.

site.description: The site associated with the task.

ConversationRecord.title: ConversationRecord
ConversationRecord.description: Represents a record of a conversation held with a cleaner.

cleanerId.description: The ID of the cleaner involved in the conversation.

siteId.description: The ID of the site where the conversation is relevant.

date.description: The date the conversation took place (YYYY-MM-DD).

issue.description: A summary of the issue discussed.

followUpRequired.description: Whether a follow-up meeting is required.

GoodNewsRecord.title: GoodNewsRecord
GoodNewsRecord.description: Represents a record of positive feedback or exceptional performance.

personName.description: The name of the person (cleaner or client contact) receiving praise.

siteName.description: The name of the site related to the event.

description.description: A description of the positive event or feedback.

acknowledged.description: Whether the person has been formally acknowledged.

acknowledgementNotes.description: Notes on how the person was acknowledged (e.g., 'Voucher given').

definition.description: Top-level collection storing details about each physical cleaning site.
Top-level collection storing profiles and performance ratings for each cleaner.
Collection storing action plans for sites and cleaners.
Collection storing all leave records (holiday and sickness) for cleaners.
Top-level collection storing the cleaning schedule.
Sub-collection storing consumable items specific to a site.
Collection storing monthly supply order records for all sites. The document ID is a composite key: {siteId}-{consumableId}-{yyyy}-{MM}.
Collection storing monthly audit records for all sites. The document ID is a composite key: {siteId}-{yyyy}-{MM}.
Collection storing records of conversations with cleaners.
Collection storing records of positive feedback and exceptional performance.
